name: @nextrap/ntl-2col
description: Responsive two-column layout web component for Nextrap content sections.

elements.name: ntl-2col
elements.description: Responsive two-column layout with header/footer outside and top/bottom inside the wrapper.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Reflected breakpoint mode, usually managed by the component.

slots.description: Main column content. Direct p:has(img) children can be moved automatically to the aside slot.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Content rendered above and outside the wrapper frame. Direct children with class .header are assigned automatically.

slots.name: top
slots.description: Content rendered at the top inside the wrapper frame. Direct children with class .top are assigned automatically.

slots.name: aside
slots.description: Aside column content. Direct children with class .aside and direct p:has(img) children are assigned automatically.

slots.name: bottom
slots.description: Content rendered at the bottom inside the wrapper frame. Direct children with class .bottom are assigned automatically.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Content rendered below and outside the wrapper frame. Direct children with class .footer are assigned automatically.

classes.name: ntl-2col
classes.description: Base class added automatically by the component.

classes.name: default
classes.description: Semantic default styling hook used by the package default.scss.

classes.name: reverse
classes.description: Reverse the order of the columns in mobile and desktop mode.

classes.name: reverse-desktop
classes.description: Reverse the order of the columns only in desktop mode.

classes.name: mobile-reverse
classes.description: Reverse the order of the columns in mobile mode.

classes.name: desktop-reverse
classes.description: Reverse the order of the columns in desktop mode.

classes.name: alternating
classes.description: Styling hook for alternating desktop column order, usually applied to a wrapper around multiple ntl-2col elements.

classes.name: breakout-start
classes.description: Enable a desktop breakout layout towards the viewport start.

classes.name: breakout-end
classes.description: Enable a desktop breakout layout towards the viewport end.

classes.name: with-main-justify-center
classes.description: Vertically center the main column content.

classes.name: with-background-and-divider
classes.description: Apply the background-and-divider variant when the matching SCSS mixin is included.

classes.name: header
classes.description: Light DOM helper class: direct children with this class are assigned to the header slot.

classes.name: top
classes.description: Light DOM helper class: direct children with this class are assigned to the top slot.

classes.name: aside
classes.description: Light DOM helper class: direct children with this class are assigned to the aside slot.

classes.name: bottom
classes.description: Light DOM helper class: direct children with this class are assigned to the bottom slot.

classes.name: footer
classes.description: Light DOM helper class: direct children with this class are assigned to the footer slot.

classes.name: auto
classes.description: Class set by the component on automatically assigned aside content such as direct p:has(img) children.

properties.name: --breakpoint
properties.description: Breakpoint where the layout switches between mobile and desktop mode. Default: md.

properties.name: --cols
properties.description: Desktop main column width in a 12-column model. Default: 6.

properties.name: --container-render-width
properties.description: Internal/advanced rendered container width override, used by breakout variants.

properties.name: --container-margin-left
properties.description: Internal/advanced container left margin override, used by breakout variants.

properties.name: --container-margin-right
properties.description: Internal/advanced container right margin override, used by breakout variants.

properties.name: --inner-padding
properties.description: Padding applied to wrapper children. Default: var(--nt-space-3).

properties.name: --section-bg
properties.description: Background of the host section. Default: transparent.

properties.name: --background
properties.description: Default-style internal wrapper background variable. The wrapper is transparent by default via $wrapper-bg-color.

properties.name: --border
properties.description: Wrapper border set by default-style(). Default: 1px solid var(--nt-dark).

properties.name: --border-radius
properties.description: Wrapper border radius set by default-style(). Default: var(--nt-border-radius).

properties.name: --aspectRatio
properties.description: Aside aspect ratio when default-style($aspectRatio: ...) is used.

properties.name: --breakout-container-width
properties.description: Internal/advanced breakout container width, used by breakout variants.

properties.name: --breakout-space
properties.description: Internal/advanced calculated breakout space, used by breakout variants.
